sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_acos (value DOUBLE, result DOUBLE);
INSERT INTO test_acos (value, result) VALUES (0.5, acos(0.5));
UPDATE test_acos SET result = acos(-0.5) WHERE value = -0.5;
SELECT value, result FROM test_acos WHERE result IS NOT NULL;
SELECT value, acos(value) AS computed_result FROM test_acos;
